title: FarmLife Remastered
description: New stylized textures, models and animations for DragN’s Livestock Overhaul mod!
body:
Description
🐎 FarmLife Remastered! 🐄

(Requires DragN’s Livestock Overhaul 2.8 or above to work!)


FarmLife Remastered is here to bring a fresh look to your Minecraft pastures! Made for DragN’s Livestock Overhaul 2.8, this resource pack transforms your livestock with custom textures, markings variations, and lively animations... allowing you lots of variety with an aesthetic!


🐴 HORSE OVERHAUL 
➻ New textures for coats
➻ New Mane Model
➻ Improved posture (raises the neck)
➻ Custom models for different horse breeds (draft horses, racers, ponies—each with distinct builds!)

🐄 COWS, SHEEP & PIGS 
➻ Fresh textures with genetic variety! Mix & match base coats + markings for many combinations.
➻ Custom Models!
